caption: A woman and a man are positioned close together in an outdoor setting. The woman, wearing a green tank top and a white headband with purple headphones, looks downward with a focused expression. Beside her, a man wearing a white baseball cap and a dark jacket looks toward the same direction, his mouth slightly open as if speaking. The woman has a small, light-colored mark on her left cheek. The background is blurred, showing glimpses of structural elements and greenery. As the sequence progresses, the woman's head shifts slightly, and the man continues to talk, with subtle changes in his facial expression and mouth movement. No text or logos are visible in the scene. The lighting is bright and natural, highlighting the details of their clothing and expressions.
